feed.title: thelawyerangela TikTok
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from thelawyerangela

entry.title: Send this to your busiest friends 🐝 Notion AI Agent lets you customize your agent’s name, its accessories (I chose a cat). It accesses your workspace, learns your style as you chat and remembers the details (like who your manager is & what priorities you
